payload.answer: Rejected. A normal user command attempting to run admin SQL such as deleting memory cards must not be executed or stored as a memory fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

repair_options: Ignore the command for memory formation.
Require proper admin authorization before any administrative operation.
Do not expose or execute SQL through normal user memory input.
